REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 30, 2026. ON APRIL 3, 2026 THE COURT ORDERED SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF WAS FILED, BUT DOES NOT ADDRESS ALL ISSUES PER THE COURT'S ORDER. NO LATER THAN JUNE 5, 2026 RESPONDENTS TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF (NOT TO EXCEED 2 PAGES), STATING SPECIFICALLY WHAT IS RESPONDENT'S "ARGUED-FOR TIMELINE" WITHIN THE DEFINITION OF "PROMPT" THAT THE RESPONDENTS ASKS THE COURT TO ADOPT. RESPONDENT TO PROVIDE THE EXACT DATE BY WHICH RESPONDENT BELIEVES THE REJECTION SHOULD HAVE BEEN PROCESSED, GIVEN THE SUBMISSION FOR FILING ON SUNDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2025. PETITIONER MAY FILE A RESPONSE TO THE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF (NOT TO EXCEED 2 PAGES) ADDRESSING THE SAME ISSUE, I.E. THE TIMELINE FOR "PROMPT REJECTION." JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO MAY 1, 2026. NO LATER THAN APRIL 15, 2026 RESPONDENT SHALL (1) FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF NOT TO EXCEED 2 PAGES (A) PROVIDING THE SOURCE OF THE REQUIREMENT QUOTED AT PAGE 7 OF THE OPPOSITION: "THE COURT 'MUST PROMPTLY SEND NOTICE OF THE REJECTION' AND STATE REASONS," AND (B) ADDRESS THE MEANING OF "PROMPTLY," SPECIFICALLY THE TIMELINE FOR "PROMPT" NOTICE OF REJECTION AND AUTHORITY SUPPORTING THE ARGUED-FOR TIMELINE; (2) DECLARATION STATING THE REASONS FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO JANUARY 6, 2026 NOTICE OF DEMAND FOR RELEASE OF MECHANICS LIEN. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER SUPREME DUMPLINGS STONESTOWN LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees is continued to June 30, 2026. On April 3, 2026 the Court ordered supplemental briefing. Supplemental brief was filed, but does not address all issues per the Court's order. No later than June 5, 2026 respondents to file a supplemental brief (not to exceed 2 pages), stating specifically what is respondent's "argued-for timeline" within the definition of "prompt" that the respondents asks the Court to adopt. Respondent to provide the exact date by which respondent believes the rejection should have been processed, given the submission for filing on Sunday, December 7, 2025. Petitioner may file a response to the supplemental brief (not to exceed 2 pages) addressing the same issue, i.e. the timeline for "prompt rejection."

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Continued To May-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER SUPREME DUMPLINGS STONESTOWN LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees is continued to May 1, 2026. No later than April 15, 2026 respondent shall (1) file a supplemental brief not to exceed 2 pages (a) providing the source of the requirement quoted at page 7 of the opposition: "the court 'must promptly send notice of the rejection' and state reasons," and (b) address the meaning of "promptly," specifically the timeline for "prompt" notice of rejection and authority supporting the argued-for timeline; (2) declaration stating the reasons for failure to respond to January 6, 2026 Notice of Demand for Release of Mechanics Lien.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
